arts.ttl: Sam Beukema: “Thiago Motta is a genius, he had me playing in midfield”
arts.sum: Sam Beukema, the Bologna defender linked with a potential move to Juventus in the upcoming January transfer window, recently shared insights about his experience under coach Thiago Motta in an interview with Cronache di spogliatoio. Reflecting on his time at Bologna, Beukema praised Motta’s innovative approach: “I called Thiago Motta a genius. When I arrived at Bologna, he asked me to play in midfield. I thought, ‘But I’m a central defender, what am I doing in midfield?’ Gradually, I understood his style of play. I started getting comfortable with having space behind me, which I wasn’t used to. arts.ttl: “Tomorrow is very Important for us”: Bologna’s Vincenzo Italiano prepares for Lille clash
arts.sum: As Bologna prepares to face Lille in a crucial Champions League match, the stakes are high for both teams. The Italian side, yet to score a goal in the tournament, is eager to change their fortunes against a formidable Lille team. Coach Vincenzo Italiano addressed the media in a pre-match press conference, emphasizing the importance of the upcoming game. “Tomorrow is very important,” Italiano stated. “There are four matches left. If our calculations are correct, we are still in the running. arts.ttl: Champions League | Bologna v Lille: Match Prediction, Preview, Team News and Lineups
arts.sum: As Bologna prepare to host Lille at the Stadio Renato Dall’Ara on Wednesday evening, the stakes are high for both teams in this UEFA Champions League clash. With Bologna still seeking their first points of the tournament, they face a formidable opponent in Lille, who are looking to solidify their position for a playoff spot. Bologna’s journey in this season’s Champions League has been challenging. After a promising start with a goalless draw against Shakhtar Donetsk, they have since suffered three consecutive losses—first to Liverpool and Aston Villa in England, followed by a defeat against Monaco.
